name.description: Primary site owner or author name.

email.description: Public contact email address for the site owner.

website.description: Personal website domain for the site owner.

github.description: GitHub username for the site owner.

twitter.description: Twitter username for the site owner.

origin.description: Canonical site origin used for absolute URLs, SEO metadata, and feeds.

pages.description: Metadata for site pages, used for titles, descriptions, and route lookups.

items.description: Page metadata for a single route.

title.description: Human-readable page title used in navigation and metadata.

description.description: Short page summary used for SEO metadata and previews.

socials.description: Social, feed, and external profile links shown by the site.

items.description: A single social or external profile link.

href.description: URL or internal path for the social link.

title.description: Display label for the social link.

resume.description: Structured resume content rendered on the resume page.

title.description: Professional headline shown below the resume name.

summary.description: Brief professional summary shown near the top of the resume.

location.description: Current location or remote availability shown in the resume header.

experience.description: Work history entries shown in the resume experience section.

role.description: Job title or role held at the company.

context.description: Short context label describing the company, product, or team.

place.description: Location or work arrangement for the role.

points.description: Impact bullets or responsibilities for the role.

tech.description: Technologies, languages, and tools used in the role.

items.description: A single technology, language, or tool label.

projects.description: Selected projects shown in the resume projects section.

name.description: Project name shown in the projects section.

tag.description: A short technology or category label for the project.

description.description: Brief summary of the project and its purpose.

education.description: Education entries shown in the resume education section.

period.description: Date range for the education entry.

details.description: Additional education detail, such as minor, focus area, or honors.
